title: abies balsamea var. arizonica
intro: Abies balsamea var. arizonica, also known as Arizona fir, is a variant of the balsam fir tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This coniferous evergreen tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Abies balsamea var. arizonica include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tea, essential oil, and resin forms, which are often used to promote relaxation and ease muscle tension.
